name: Eastokyo Staff
title: Editorial Desk
bio: Reporting from Tokyo, adjacent realities, and committee rooms where the coffee was already finished.

name: Editorial Bureau
title: Political Correspondents
bio: Covering ministries, committees, subcommittees, and the committees investigating those committees.

name: Tech Desk
title: Technology Correspondents
bio: Watching AI, startups, robots, and printers continue their centuries-long war against humanity.

name: Culture Desk
title: Culture & Lifestyle
bio: Investigating ramen, convenience stores, festivals, cafés, and the subtle art of pretending everything is normal.

name: Tokyo Desk
title: City Correspondents
bio: Reporting live from train platforms, narrow alleyways, and intersections with far too many pedestrians.

name: Weird Desk
title: Senior Weirdness Correspondents
bio: Dedicated to covering the stories nobody else believes until they accidentally become true.

name: Temple Cat
title: Senior Investigative Correspondent
bio: Pulitzer-nominated. Frequently unavailable. Accepts payment in premium tuna.
